ticket.subject: When trying to open and use the app to buy shippin...
ticket.raw_subject: When trying to open and use the app to buy shippin...
ticket.description:
When trying to open and use the app to buy shipping labels, it is not working at all. It keeps loading it but does not show any results. We have had to print manually through CP Direct which increase our operational costs and times.

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Hi Hispanic,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I understand that you experienced some disruption earlier.
There was a brief interruption, which has now been resolved by our team. The app is currently loading fine and should be working as expected.

Could you please check from your end and confirm if everything is working fine now?

If you still notice anything unusual, please feel free to let me know—I’ll be happy to assist further.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Hispanic,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
I understand that you experienced some disruption earlier.
There was a brief interruption, which has now been resolved by our team. The app is currently loading fine and should be working as expected.
 
Could you please check from your end and confirm if everything is working fine now?
 
If you still notice anything unusual, please feel free to let me know—I’ll be happy to assist further.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

Request #386236 "Hispanic Pantry has a question a..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #386236:



27 April 2026





### New message about PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label



**Hispanic Pantry** sent you a message. See it below.





 



----URGENT----
Good morning team.
You app is stil unavailable (doesn't upload). we have already tried different browsers just in case with same results.
We have plenty of orders to dispatch but we cannot create labels without it so we need urgent assistance.
Please feel free to reach out to me directly if needed: 0428 164 788 (Gus)



 ![Shopping Bag](https://cdn.shopify.com/static/email-modules-library/img/ShoppingBag_black_wpill.png) ![Shopping Bag](https://cdn.shopify.com/static/email-modules-library/img/ShoppingBag_white_wpill.png)

comments.body:
Thanks for coming back Priyanka.

I can confirm the app is working now.

However, I've just had another error with it. This is not the first time, last week I had the same problem with another order. I've managed to go through the courier's website directly to print the label but I guess we need this sorted so we do not keep on spending time doing that.

Attached are both logs, one for today's order and another from last week. Would you be able to look into them and advice?

Thanks in advance.
comments.html_body:
Thanks for coming back Priyanka.
I can confirm the app is working now.
However, I've just had another error with it. This is not the first time, last week I had the same problem with another order. I've managed to go through the courier's website directly to print the label but I guess we need this sorted so we do not keep on spending time doing that.
Attached are both logs, one for today's order and another from last week. Would you be able to look into them and advice?
Thanks in advance.

 spending time doing that. 
 
Attached are both logs, one for today's order and another from last week. Would you be able to look into them and advice? 
 
Thanks in advance.

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1777275279124579

Australia Store using the MCSL-S app with CouriersPlease and MPB for rates and labels.
Customer has shared 2 label failure cases for CouriersPlease - Orders **HP#110710926** and **HP#110710886**.
Here, the label failure errors are not clear (errors - 403 Forbidden and Unidentified Error).
Could you please check and let us know if these errors are due to something on our end, OR, it is an error from carrier side?
Attached the label failure logs for reference.

URL - hispanic-pantry.myshopify.com
Account ID - 902d6fde-46d9-44e4-adc7-156a3a214a46
